Terms of Service

Last updated: July 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using CalcHub (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service. CalcHub is a project by Osama.

2. Description of Service

CalcHub provides free, browser-based calculators including but not limited to: Loan EMI, Compound Interest, Salary Tax (Pakistan), Tip, Discount, Profit Margin, BMI, Calorie, Body Fat, Ideal Weight, Due Date, Percentage, Age, Unit Converter, GPA, Grade, Fuel Cost, Currency Converter, Time Zone Converter, and Password Generator. All calculations occur entirely client-side in your browser.

3. Free Usage

Free users may perform up to 15 calculations per day. This limit resets daily. Free users see summary results for most calculators but do not have access to detailed breakdowns such as monthly amortization schedules or year-by-year compound interest tables. We reserve the right to modify these limits at any time.

4. Premium Subscription

Premium plans are available at two tiers:

  • Monthly: $3/month, billed monthly, cancel anytime
  • Lifetime: $49 one-time payment, permanent access

Premium benefits include unlimited daily calculations (no 15/day cap), detailed breakdowns for financial and compound interest calculators, an ad-free experience, and priority support. Payments are processed securely through LemonSqueezy.

5. Accuracy Disclaimer

CalcHub calculators are provided for informational and educational purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee that results are error-free. Financial, health, and tax calculations should not be used as the sole basis for any financial, medical, or legal decisions. Always consult a qualified professional for important decisions. Currency conversion rates are approximate and may differ from real-time market rates.

6. User Responsibilities

  • You may not use the Service for any illegal purposes
  • You may not attempt to overload, hack, or disrupt the Service
  • You may not reverse-engineer or resell the Service
  • You acknowledge that calculation results are not professional advice

7. Intellectual Property

The CalcHub website, design, code, and branding are owned by Osama. You may not copy, modify, or redistribute any part of the Service without explicit written permission. Calculation results generated by the Service are yours to use freely.

8. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the Service will be error-free, uninterrupted, or meet your specific requirements. Calculation accuracy may vary depending on input values and rounding methods used.

9. Limitation of Liability

In no event shall CalcHub or Osama be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service, including but not limited to financial losses based on calculation results.

10. Refund Policy

Monthly: Cancel anytime, no refunds after 48 hours. Lifetime: 30-day money-back guarantee. Contact support@calchub.com to request a refund.

11. Modifications

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

12. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at: support@calchub.com

© 2026 CalcHub. A Project by Osama. All rights reserved.
